MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: A delicacy served at Greg's Cafe

id.description: Unique identifier of the menu item

price.description: Price in cents or standard currency units

description.description: A short descriptive label of the delicacy

imageUrl.description: URL to the visual asset of the item

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order placed by a customer from a specific table

id.description: Firestore document ID, also order ID

tableNumber.description: The table number from where order was placed

status.description: Current tracking status of the order

items.description: List of ordered items with quantities

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was placed

CafeConfig.title: CafeConfig
CafeConfig.description: Operational configuration settings for the cafe

is_closed.description: Operational lock flag. If true, customer menu is fully disabled.

/menu_items/{itemId}.description: Collection of available food and drink items on the menu

/orders/{orderId}.description: Collection of table orders with active fulfillment status tracking

/config/{configId}.description: Configuration settings like cafe open/close status
